name: crumbling_watchtower
description: A decrepit stone tower perched at the edge of the foothills. The stairways are treacherous, the floors unstable. Agile explorers have found more than crumbling masonry within its walls.
note_texts: Fresh rope marks on the windowsills. Someone uses this tower regularly.
A hidden cache inside a cracked wall: lockpicks, a short blade, and a coded ledger.
The ledger is a tally of stolen goods and split payments. The rogues operate out of somewhere beneath the hill.
A trapdoor in the floor, recently oiled, its hinges silent. Worn boot prints surround it.
The trapdoor opens onto a carved stairway going deep into the earth. The Shadow Den waits below.
unlock_message: The Shadow Den is revealed beneath the tower — enter and face the rogues within.
